d7b_reasoning: The strategy exhibits coherent internal logic: it combines calendar timing (Monday entry) with mean-reversion signals (low RSI, negative z-score, compressed volatility) and exits on either mean-reversion completion (RSI recovery plus positive returns) or calendar timeout (mid-week with z-score normalization).
